grant_title: Anne M. and Philip H. Glatfelter, III Family Foundation
geographic_restrictions: southeastern Pennsylvania, with emphasis on the Harrisburg area
project_area: arts and culture; education; the environment; healthcare; religion; and social welfare
eligibility_summary: Nonprofit organizations in southeastern Pennsylvania (emphasis on Harrisburg area) are eligible for one-time or multi-year grants in arts and culture, education, environment, healthcare, religion, or social welfare.
